description_long: This skateboard features a standard popsicle-shaped deck with a slightly concave profile and upturned nose and tail. The deck is adorned with a dark grip tape surface, decorated with playful white and colored graphics, including a smiling face and geometric shapes. The underside of the deck is not visible, but the top shows a mix of white stripes and colored blocks, giving it a modern, urban aesthetic. The skateboard is equipped with four small, hard wheels mounted on metal trucks, suitable for street or park skating. The trucks are standard in design, with a metallic finish and visible mounting hardware. The overall appearance suggests a well-used, functional skateboard designed for tricks and urban mobility.
description: A popsicle-shaped skateboard with dark grip tape, playful white and colored graphics, and standard metal trucks with small hard wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose of the skateboard, grip tape with white stripes, and colored graphic elements.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the concave deck, upturned nose and tail, and the full set of wheels and trucks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail end of the skateboard, grip tape graphics, and the deck's thickness.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the deck's curvature, wheels, and additional grip tape graphics.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The deck features a playful graphic design with a white smiling face, white stripes, and colored geometric blocks (red, yellow, green) on a dark background, giving it a modern and urban look.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small and hard, light color with no visible branding or text.
attribute_truck_style: Standard street trucks, metallic silver color, top-mount with visible hardware, no visible branding.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: Dark grip tape with white stripes and colored graphic elements, featuring a smiling face and geometric shapes.
